topic_title: Acceptable error — defining the failure threshold tolerable for a use case

label_clarity.notes: FP and FN expanded to 'false positive' and 'false negative' within each node label. All labels plain language.

scope.notes: All nodes represent 9.10 concepts: threshold-setting process (Steps 1–4) and FP/FN asymmetry examples. No 9.11 content.

layout.structure: 4-step linear flow with dotted detour branches from S2 to two contrasting examples (SPAM, MED) converging back at S3; decision diamond at S4 leads to PASS or REVISE
layout.notes: Dotted branches effectively illustrate that Step 2 always involves FP/FN cost comparison; both examples converge back to Step 3.

verdict: PASS — all checks clear on cycle 1. 8 nodes within range. FP/FN expanded in labels. Scope confined to 9.10. TB layout with dotted example branches illustrates Step 2's cost-analysis requirement. Project palette applied correctly. PNG rendered clean.
